raw_response: analysisWe need pick one player to vote. Based on discussion, Mike claims to be troublemaker, but others suspect him. Mitchell claims to be werewolf? But Mike says he's troublemaker. But troublemaker is village. So if Mike is troublemaker, then werewolves could be Mitchell and maybe someone else. But center had werewolf? Justin saw werewolf in center. That suggests maybe one werewolf in center. So maybe only one werewolf among players. Who? Could be Mike? But he says he's troublemaker. Could be lying. Mitchell says he saw werewolf in center, implying there is a werewolf in center, so maybe no werewolf among players. But then why would anyone be werewolf? Maybe Mike is the werewolf and lied. But Mike claims to be troublemaker. But could be lying. Also Justin says he saw werewolf in center. So likely no werewolf among players. But then why would Mike claim to be troublemaker? He might be lying to deflect. But if no werewolf, village wins if no one dies. But we must vote someone. We should vote someone likely werewolf. Who is most suspicious? Mike claims to be troublemaker but others suspect him. Mitchell claims to be werewolf? Actually Mitchell says "I was the revealer." He says he saw werewolf in center. He also says "I have 100% confidence that he's a werewolf" referring to Mike. So Mitchell accuses Mike. Mike denies. So likely Mike is werewolf.
